parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Create/update table from CLI

actor User
participant CLI
collections "Model Spec" as ModelSpec
collections "Database Spec" as DatabaseSpec
database Database

User -> CLI : $>gaa update model
DatabaseSpec -> CLI : Read database spec file
ModelSpec -> CLI : Read model spec file
CLI -> Database : Create or update table

@enduml
```
